_mo_ta: Checklist bao ve phan cung (an toan vat ly) - De tai 31, dung lam file config/du lieu co cau truc trong repo (configs/hardening_checklist.json). Trang thai 'dat' can dien lai theo ket qua kiem tra thuc te truoc khi nop bao cao.

phan_vung.ten_phan_vung: 1. Vo va tiep can vat ly

tieu_chi.noi_dung: Vo thiet bi co co che chong thao (tamper switch/seal)
Co canh bao/log khi vo bi mo trai phep
Thiet bi duoc dat o vi tri han che nguoi la tiep can
Nhan/tem niem phong khong the thao roi lap lai nguyen ven
JTAG bi vo hieu hoa o ban release (eFuse)
UART debug console bi tat/gioi han o ban release
Khong de ho chan header debug tren PCB thanh pham
Neu can debug field, co co che xac thuc truoc khi mo debug
Flash Encryption duoc bat (khong luu firmware dang ro)
Secure Boot duoc bat (chi chay firmware da ky hop le)
Khong hard-code secret/khoa trong source hoac firmware
Co co che chong rollback ve firmware cu co lo hong
Khoa ky (signing key) duoc luu ngoai repo, co kiem soat truy cap
Moi thiet bi dung khoa/ID rieng, khong dung chung 1 khoa cho ca lo
Co quy trinh thu hoi/khoa thiet bi khi bi mat/thao
Log su kien tamper duoc luu tap trung, co timestamp
Co quy trinh phan ung khi phat hien canh bao tamper
Kiem tra dinh ky tinh trang vat ly cua thiet bi trien khai
Tai lieu huong dan xu ly su co vat ly cho nguoi van hanh
Danh gia lai checklist nay sau moi lan cap nhat firmware/phan cung
